zh.lifeSummary: Thomas Had是Jo. Hadd和Cicely Englis的兒子，出生。他至少有1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Thomas Had是Jo. Hadd和Cicely Englis的儿子，出生。他至少有1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Had
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Muslim: nickname for a pilgrim to Mecca, from Arabic ḥājj ‘pilgrim, someone who has undertaken the hadj’ (see also Haji ), from ḥajj ‘the pilgrimage to Mecca’. Compare Alhaj , Elhaj , and Hajj .

variants.name: Alhaj
meanings: Muslim (also Al-Haj): variant of Haj , with the addition of al ‘the’. Compare Elhaj .

variants.name: Elhaj
meanings: Muslim (also El-Haj): variant of Haj , with the addition of el ‘the’. Compare Alhaj and Elhage .

variants.name: Haji
meanings: Muslim: from ḥajjī ‘hadji’, an Arabic title denoting someone who has undertaken the hadj, from ḥajj ‘the pilgrimage to Mecca (enjoined on all Muslims as the fifth pillar of Islam)’. See also Haj .
Muslim: from a personal name based on Arabic ḥajjī ‘hadji’ (see 1 above).

Somali: from a Somali Muslim personal name of Arabic origin (see 2 above). It is also found in Ethiopia. — Note: Since Somalis traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, this name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.
